dashboard.title: Dashboard
marketing.hero_sub: The first integrated platform to manage your conferences, track attendance, and generate badges in one click.
marketing.f1_desc: Scan the code via any phone or scanner and verify attendance in a second.
marketing.f2_desc: No more manual design. We generate thousands of printable digital badges instantly.
marketing.f5_desc: Private space for each guest to download their badge, view the agenda, and get certificates.
marketing.f6_desc: Smart directory allowing attendees to connect and exchange contact info securely.
marketing.f7_desc: Issue PDF attendance certificates automatically upon checkout or event completion.
marketing.f8_desc: Live display for sharing photos and impressions to boost engagement.
marketing.f9_desc: Integrated system for asking speakers questions and conducting real-time polls.
marketing.f10_desc: Ability to change colors, logos, and backgrounds to match each event's unique identity.
marketing.f11_desc: Statistical displays shown to the crowd showing attendance rates and event progress.
marketing.f12_desc: Sell tickets and collect fees electronically via CIB and local bank cards.
marketing.f13_desc: Coordinate multi-track sessions and manage speaker bios professionally.
marketing.f14_desc: Send instant broadcast alerts and session reminders to all attendees.
marketing.f15_desc: Dedicated spaces to showcase sponsors and analyze brand reach.
marketing.f16_desc: Generate comprehensive audit files and international standard logs.
marketing.f3_desc: Monitor attendance stats and organization ratios directly on your dashboard.
marketing.f4_desc: Whether the internet drops or not, registration won't stop. Works locally and syncs later.
marketing.basic_desc: Perfect for small events and limited local workshops.
marketing.pro_desc: Most popular for medium conferences and seminars. Best value.
marketing.enterprise_desc: For companies and ministries organizing massive conferences.
marketing.footer_rights: All rights reserved © 2026 Diwan Event Manager.
marketing.calc_sub: Choose only the services you need and get an instant quote for your event
marketing.calc_disclaimer: Price includes software upgrade for one event (up to 3 days)
marketing.contact_title: Let us help you organize your next event
marketing.contact_sub: Contact us for a free consultation or a custom quote for your organization
marketing.how_s1_desc: Upload your participant list from Excel and define their roles and categories.
marketing.how_s2_desc: Generate digital ID cards and QR codes for all attendees with a single click.
marketing.how_s3_desc: Scan codes at the entrance using a phone and track attendance in real-time.
marketing.how_s4_desc: Get your statistics, attendance certificates, and final reports instantly and with 100% accuracy.
marketing.faq_q1: Does the platform work without an internet connection?
marketing.faq_a1: Yes, thanks to PWA technology, the platform can record attendance even when the internet is down, and synchronizes data automatically once the connection is restored.
marketing.faq_q2: Do I need to buy special equipment for scanning?
marketing.faq_a2: No, you can use any smartphone (Android or iPhone) as a scanner directly via the browser. The platform also supports wired and wireless scanners.
marketing.faq_q3: How is payment made for the platform?
marketing.faq_a3: We support electronic payment via Edahabia and CIB cards, and we also accept payment via postal and bank transfers for organizations.
marketing.faq_q4: How secure is participant data on the platform?
marketing.faq_a4: We use advanced encryption (SSL) and secure databases, fully complying with international and local data protection laws.
marketing.faq_q5: Can badges be printed directly from the system?
marketing.faq_a5: Yes, the system generates print-ready PDF files in global standard sizes. It can also be linked with thermal printers for instant on-site printing.
marketing.faq_q6: Is technical support available during event days?
marketing.faq_a6: Yes, we provide technical support via phone and email. We also offer 'On-site Support' services to send a technical team to oversee the check-in process at your venue.
marketing.faq_q7: Does the platform support multi-day events?
marketing.faq_a7: Yes, you can track attendance for each day independently, with consolidated reports showing presence throughout the entire event duration.
